name: mwbmpartners/webms-intra
description: Internal portal platform — manifest-only composer.json for Dependabot CVE watching. No `composer install` is ever run; libraries are vendored manually under web/_vendor/ and web/_libraries/ because DreamHost shared hosting has no CLI. See DEV_NOTES.md for the manifest-only rationale (#145).

require._comment: kelvinmo/simplejwt is vendored under web/_vendor/simplejwt/ — Dependabot watches Packagist for CVEs against this exact version even though we don't run composer install.
require._comment_dompdf: dompdf 3.1.5 is server-managed under web/_libraries/ (gitignored); declared here so Dependabot reports any future CVEs.

config._comment: We never run composer install in this repo. The lock file is intentionally absent.
